title: The Book of Hope
author: Jane Goodall
subline: Survival and the human spirit in a turbulent world.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A chimp's hand cradling a single seedling — abstracted to silhouettes. The chimp's hand is a hairline shape, the seedling is the only chromatic element (a tiny green-red shoot: a red stem + two ash leaves). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1000)">
    <!-- Chimp's hand outline (abstracted) — large open palm -->
    <path d="M -400 100 Q -380 -100 -200 -150 Q 0 -200 200 -150 Q 400 -120 420 60 Q 420 200 300 240 Q 100 280 -100 260 Q -300 250 -380 220 Q -420 180 -400 100 Z" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Fingers indication: short hairlines crossing the palm -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <line x1="-300" y1="-130" x2="-280" y2="-180"/>
      <line x1="-200" y1="-160" x2="-180" y2="-220"/>
      <line x1="-100" y1="-180" x2="-80" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-180" x2="20" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="100" y1="-170" x2="120" y2="-220"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="-150" x2="220" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="-100" x2="320" y2="-150"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The seedling in the palm: a red vertical stem with two ash leaves -->
    <g>
      <line x1="0" y1="-60" x2="0" y2="-200" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
      <ellipse cx="-25" cy="-160" rx="30" ry="10" transform="rotate(-30 -25 -160)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      <ellipse cx="25" cy="-130" rx="30" ry="10" transform="rotate(30 25 -130)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-200" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- A small whisper text below: the chimp's name — 'FLO' (Jane Goodall's matriarch) -->
  <text x="800" y="1340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">FLO</text>
  <!-- A soft label arc -->
  <text x="800" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">GOMBE · 1960 — PRESENT</text>
</svg>
rationale: An abstracted chimp's hand cradling a tiny seedling in its palm. The chimp is a hairline ash silhouette; the seedling has a red stem and red tip — the only chromatic accent, fragile life held in a chimp's palm. The whisper 'FLO' references Jane Goodall's matriarch Flo, the first chimp who trusted her. Below: 320px mixed-case 'The Book / of Hope' title in weight 300.
